---
title: Research Resources
page-navigation: false
toc: true
# date: Aug 9 2025
---

<!-- this should be a table with submission deadlines and keywords -->

<!-- numpy or link to csv incl. -->

## Conferences

[ISEA International Symposium on Electronic Art](https://www.isea-international.org/)

[SAR International Conference on Artistic Research](https://artisticresearch.online/international-meetings-and-events)

[POM Politics of Machines](https://pom-conference.org/)


<!-- HCI Conferences -->

<!-- [SIGGRAPH]() -->

<!-- [CHI]() -->

## Journals

[JAR Journal for Artistic Research](https://www.jar-online.net/en/issues/37)

## Residencies & Fellowships

[Akademie Schloss Solitude, Web & Stuttgart](https://www.akademie-solitude.de/de/)

<!-- ask Ren -->

[ZKU Zentrum für Kunst und Urbanistic, Berlin](https://www.zku-berlin.org/)

## Practice-based PhDs

## Prizes

<!-- [Ars Electronica]() -->

## Other PhDs
